signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner for India Uranium Positioning
signals.summary: Uranium exporters: engage Global Affairs Canada (GAC) India trade desk immediately to register for CEPA preferential tariff claims. $2.6B deal window closes within 90 days.

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner India Desk
signals.summary: Uranium exporters and mining firms—engage MCCI (Market Access, Competitiveness & Innovation) India team for CEPA tariff line verification and buyer introductions. Window closes as tariff codes finaliz

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner Service for India Pulse Market Entry
signals.summary: Trade Commissioner Service India desk + immediate DGFT quota liaison. Q2 2026 window requires real-time market intelligence and customs documentation support this week.

signals.headline: Screen Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) Market Intel on US Tariffs
signals.summary: Trade Commissioner Service provides real-time Section 232 exemption status and industry impacts. Essential this week to validate supply chain exposure before July 2026 CUSMA deadline.

signals.headline: Register with Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) – EU AI Act Desk
signals.summary: TCS EU AI Act Navigator provides real-time compliance pathways and early-access briefings. Registration this week enables inclusion in official Canadian delegation to Brussels compliance workshops.

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) Aerospace Desk
signals.summary: TCS Germany and TCS United States have embedded defence liaisons. Engage this week to access NORAD and Bundeswehr procurement roadmaps before Q1 RFIs.
